title: Low Calorie Flaky Peppery Egg Crumble
description: A comforting Russian dish featuring egg, spices, and a flaky texture that is low in calories and perfect for breakfast or snack time.
instructions: In a mixing bowl, crack in the eggs and add salt and pepper. Whisk until frothy.
Gradually stir in flour and baking powder into the egg mixture until it starts to form lumps. The consistency should be slightly thickened but still pourable.
With clean hands, shape the dough into 4-6 small balls (about golf ball size). Roll each ball between your palms a few times until evenly flattened and roughly circular in shape.
Place the rolled crumbles on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Bake for 10-12 minutes or until golden brown.
Let it cool before serving. Optionally, you can sprinkle some finely chopped herbs like parsley or chives over the top for additional flavor and color.
